challenge.title: Korak 20
challenge.description: Sada kada je metoda __init__ završena, kreiraj varijablu pod nazivom series1 unutar bloka try. Dodeli joj instancu TVSeries, prosleđujući argumente po izboru. Zatim, ispiši series1 na konzolu.

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should assign an instance of TVSeries to a variable named series1 within the try block.

challengeFiles.name: main
